name: simpler-service3-frontend
summary: A React + Vite + TypeScript single-page client for the simpler-service3 Hono API. It monitors service health, lets users configure which API instance to talk to at runtime, and exercises full CRUD over two business entities (kenguroos and grass).

modules.name: Kenguroos
modules.summary: Kangaroo records domain — an aggregate identified by id with a name and age. Provides list/get/create/update/delete over the /kenguroos resource and a UI panel for managing them.

modules.name: Grass
modules.summary: Grass records domain — an aggregate identified by id with a name and height. Provides list/get/create/update/delete over the /grass resource and a UI panel for managing them.

modules.name: Record Management
modules.summary: Shared editing surface that renders any name+numeric entity as a table with add/edit/delete/refresh interactions, parameterized per aggregate via EntityConfig. Backs both the Kenguroos and Grass domains.

modules.name: Service Health
modules.summary: Monitoring capability that probes the backend /health (and root) endpoints and surfaces reachable/healthy/unreachable status to the user.

modules.name: API Connection
modules.summary: Lets users point the client at any simpler-service3 instance at runtime — the configurable, localStorage-persisted API base URL, its build-time default, and the settings UI to change or reset it.

modules.name: infrastructure
modules.summary: Cross-cutting technical plumbing: the HTTP transport/fetch wrapper and ApiError handling, app bootstrap and shell, branding, styling, dev-server proxy, TypeScript config, and build tooling.
